character.name: Asian chibi cyberpunk mercenary with black hair and wearing glasses. He has a big expressive head and a small body with a calm, neutral expression. He is wearing a green hoodie and blue jeans. His hands are empty and resting by his sides. 16-bit pixel art style, high contrast, clean and sharp details.
